zh.lifeSummary: 當Nils Erlandsson Kagge於1455年出生在瑞典索德曼藍德福洛達時，他的父親Mattias  Mats Erlandsson  Kagg29歲，母親Birgitta Germundsdotter Lilja25歲。他於大約1495年與Anna Pedersdotter Örnflycht在瑞典索德曼藍德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1511年6月4日在瑞典索德曼藍德費亞爾斯亞福特享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nils Erlandsson Kagge于1455年出生在瑞典索德曼藍德福洛達时，他的父亲Mattias  Mats Erlandsson  Kagg29岁，母亲Birgitta Germundsdotter Lilja25岁。他于大约1495年与Anna Pedersdotter Örnflycht在瑞典索德曼藍德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1511年6月4日在瑞典索德曼藍德費亞爾斯亞福特享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kagge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German Kegel , Kagel , or Kögel (see Kogel ).

variants.name: Kegel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gunter, Franz, Fritz, Grete, Ute, Wilhelm.

German and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle Dutch kegel ‘skittle, pin’, hence a nickname for an inveterate skittles or bowls player. The term also denoted an illegitimate child (hence the phrase (still current) mit Kind und Kegel ‘with all the family’); in Early New High German (15th century) took on the meaning ‘uncouth person’.
Slovenian: nickname from kegelj ‘skittle, pin’, a word of German origin (see 1 above). In North America, this surname may also be an altered form of the variant Kegelj and possibly also Kegl.

nameMeanings.name: Nils
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

nameMeanings.name: Erlandsson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erland, Erik, Lars, Mats, Alf, Alvar, Bjorn, Helmer, Iver, Nils, Sven.
Americanized form (and a very rare Swedish variant) of Swedish Erlandsson: patronymic from the personal name Erland, from the Old Norse byname Erlandr, meaning ‘foreign, from a foreign country’.
Americanized form of Norwegian and Danish   Erlandsen  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Erlandsen
meanings: Norwegian and Danish: patronymic from the personal name Erland (see Erlandson ).

variants.name: Erland
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name, originally a byname from örlendr ‘foreigner, stranger’.

historicEvents.title: The Russo-Swedish War
historicEvents.description: While in an alliance with Grand Prince Ivan III of Moscow, King Hans of Denmark and Norway invaded Sweden and was declared King of Sweden.

en.lifeSummary: When Nils Erlandsson Kagge was born in 1455, in Floda, Södermanland, Sweden, his father, Mattias  Mats Erlandsson  Kagg, was 29 and his mother, Birgitta Germundsdotter Lilja, was 25. He married Anna Pedersdotter Örnflycht about 1495, in Södermanland, Sweden. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 4 June 1511, in Fjällskäfte, Södermanland, Sweden, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nils Erlandsson Kagge est né en 1455, à Floda, Södermanland, Suède, son père, Mattias  Mats Erlandsson  Kagg, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Birgitta Germundsdotter Lilja, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Anna Pedersdotter Örnflycht environ 1495, à Södermanland, Suède. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 4 juin 1511, à Fjällskäfte, Södermanland, Suède, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nils Erlandsson Kagge 1455 in Floda, Södermanland, Schweden geboren wurde, war sein Vater Mattias  Mats Erlandsson  Kagg 29 und seine Mutter Birgitta Germundsdotter Lilja 25. Er hat um 1495 in Södermanland, Schweden Anna Pedersdotter Örnflycht geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 4. Juni 1511 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Fjällskäfte, Södermanland, Schweden.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nils Erlandsson Kagge è nato il nel 1455 nel Floda, Södermanland, Svezia, il suo padre, Mattias  Mats Erlandsson  Kagg, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Birgitta Germundsdotter Lilja, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Anna Pedersdotter Örnflycht circa 1495, nel Södermanland, Svezia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 4 giugno 1511, nel Fjällskäfte, Södermanland, Svezia, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nils Erlandsson Kaggeが1455年にスウェーデンスoデルマンランドフロダで生まれた時，父Mattias  Mats Erlandsson  Kaggは29歳，母Birgitta Germundsdotter Liljaは25歳であった。約1495年にスウェーデンスoデルマンランドでAnna Pedersdotter Örnflychtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1511年6月4日にスウェーデンスoデルマンランドフジaルスクaフトで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nils Erlandsson Kagge(이)가 1455년 스웨덴 스o더먼랜드 플로다에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Mattias  Mats Erlandsson  Kagg(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Birgitta Germundsdotter Lilja(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1495년 스웨덴 스o더먼랜드에서 Anna Pedersdotter Örnflycht(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1511년 6월 4일 스웨덴 스o더먼랜드 프ja스ka프트에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nils Erlandsson Kagge nasceu em 1455, em Floda, Södermanland, Suécia, seu pai, Mattias  Mats Erlandsson  Kagg, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Birgitta Germundsdotter Lilja, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Pedersdotter Örnflycht aproximadamente 1495, em Södermanland, Suécia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de junho de 1511, em Fjällskäfte, Södermanland, Suécia, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nils Erlandsson Kagge родился в 1455 г. в местности флода, сoдирманланд, Швеция, его отцу по имени Mattias  Mats Erlandsson  Kagg было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Birgitta Germundsdotter Lilja, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Pedersdotter Örnflycht около 1495 г. в местности сoдирманланд, Швеция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 4 июня 1511 г. в местности фджaллскaфт, сoдирманланд, Швеция в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nils Erlandsson Kagge nació en 1455, en Floda, Södermanland, Suecia, su papá, Mattias  Mats Erlandsson  Kagg, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Birgitta Germundsdotter Lilja, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Anna Pedersdotter Örnflycht aproximadamente 1495, en Södermanland, Suecia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 4 de junio de 1511, en Fjällskäfte, Södermanland, Suecia, a la edad de 56 años.
